  • weekly picks (Apr 1 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 Apr 1st week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    1. s41567-026-03219-1 Quantum ground-state cooling of two librational modes of a nanorotor (Nature Physics)

    2. s41563-026-02551-4 Two-dimensional materials for integrated sensing (Nature Materials)

    3. s41598-026-46385-1 Pioneering ultrastructural texture analysis of dendrites in the cerebellar dentate nucleus: an experimental rat model of hyperthermia-induced seizures (Scientific Reports)

    4. 2604.02426v1 Transport and Temperature 1: Exact spectrum and resistivity for the one-dimensional infinite-$U$ Hubbard model (arXiv)

    5. 2604.02427v1 Detection of spin- and valley-polarized states in van der Waals materials via thermoelectric and non-reciprocal transport (arXiv)

    6. 2604.02481v1 Superconductivity and fractionalized magnetic excitations in CeCoIn5 (arXiv)

    7. 2604.02499v1 CARBON-2D Topological Descriptor (C2DTD): An Interpretable and Physics-Informed Representation for Two-Dimensional Carbon Networks (arXiv)

    8. 2604.02524v1 AQVolt26: High-Temperature r$^2$SCAN Halide Dataset for Universal ML Potentials and Solid-State Batteries (arXiv)

    9. 2604.02538v1 Temperature-dependent Raman spectra of 2H-MoS2 from Machine Learning-driven statistical sampling (arXiv)

    10. 2604.02584v1 Fermionic mean-field dynamics for spin systems beyond free fermions (arXiv)

    11. 2604.02620v1 Reducing Bias and Optimising Execution Time in Iterative Solutions of the Time Dependent Ginzburg Landau Equations (arXiv)

    12. 2604.02630v1 Evolution from Landau Quantization to Discrete Scale Invariance Revealed by Quantum Oscillations in Topological Materials (arXiv)

    13. 2604.02636v1 Nonlinear Magnetic Orbital Hall Effect Induced by Spin-Orbit Coupling (arXiv)

    14. 2604.02657v1 Unraveling Intrinsic Thermal Conductivity in Layered Conductive MOF Single Crystals (arXiv)

    15. 2604.02662v1 Some typical delusions in the theory of Bose-Einstein condensation (arXiv)

    16. 2604.02705v1 The unique control features of topological stochastic and quantum systems (arXiv)

    17. 2604.02716v1 Effective electron coupling to phonon mechanical angular momentum in helical systems (arXiv)

    18. 2604.02737v1 Boundary Potential Method for Describing Electron Teleportation in an Interferometer with a Topological Superconductor (arXiv)

    19. 2604.02746v1 Zero-Freeness of the Hard-Core Model with Bounded Connective Constant (arXiv)

    20. 2604.02769v1 Semiclassical representation of the Hubbard model (arXiv)

    21. 2604.02790v1 A Route to Nonrelativistic Altermagnetic Spin Splitting via Ultrafast Light (arXiv)

    22. 2604.02805v1 Elasticity-Driven Periodic Polarization Patterns in Confined Chiral Ferroelectric Nematic Fluid (arXiv)

    23. 2604.02824v1 Disorder-induced chirality in superconductor-ferromagnet heterostructures revealed by neutron scattering and multiscale modeling (arXiv)

    24. 2604.02843v1 High-energy electronic excitations in La3Ni2O7 by time-resolved optical spectroscopy (arXiv)

    25. 2604.02855v1 Structure Functions and Intermittency for Coarsening Systems (arXiv)

    26. 2604.02856v1 Type-IV ‘t Hooft Anomalies on the Lattice: Emergent Higher-Categorical Symmetries and Applications to LSM Systems (arXiv)

    27. 2604.02857v1 Band Renormalization in Monolayer MoS2 Induced by Multipole Screening (arXiv)

    28. 2604.02872v1 Number fluctuations distinguish different self-propelling dynamics (arXiv)

    29. 2604.02879v1 Mesoscopic scattering dynamics under generic uniform SU(2) gauge fields: Spin-momentum relaxation and coherent backscattering (arXiv)

    30. 2604.02898v1 Microscopic NMR evidence for successive antiferroelectric and antiferromagnetic order in the van der Waals magnet CuCrP$_2$S$_6$ (arXiv)

    31. 2604.02914v1 Hamiltonian flocks: Time-Reversal Symmetry and its consequences (arXiv)

    32. 2604.02922v1 Mott-Derived Local Moments and Kondo Hybridization in a d-electron Kagome lattice (arXiv)

    33. 2604.02950v1 Resetting dynamics in a system with quenched disorder (arXiv)

    34. 2604.02952v1 Engineering Electrochromism in Ni-Deficient NiO through Defect, Dopant, and Strain Coupling (arXiv)

    35. 2604.02959v1 Hamiltonian learning for spin-spiral moir'e magnets from electronic magnetotransport (arXiv)

    36. 2604.02961v1 Nanomechanical detection of vortices in an electron fluid (arXiv)

    37. 2604.02974v1 Spatially inhomogeneous delithiation in LiNiO2 positive electrode: the effect of X-rays dose (arXiv)

    38. 2604.03019v1 Maximizing the magnetic anisotropy of Dy complexes by fine tuning organic ligands: A systematic multireference high-throughput exploration of over 30k molecules (arXiv)

    39. 2604.03026v1 Hilbert space fragmentation in quantum Ising systems induced by side coupling (arXiv)

    40. 2604.03068v1 Escape dynamics and implicit bias of one-pass SGD in overparameterized quadratic networks (arXiv)

    41. 2604.03099v1 Proximate quantum spin liquids and Majorana continua in magnetically ordered Kitaev magnets (arXiv)

    42. 2604.03115v1 Testing the Role of Diagonal Interactions in High-Order Hopfield Models via Dynamical Mean-Field Theory (arXiv)

    43. 2604.03177v1 Determination of the ground state polarizability of $^{162}$Dy near 530 nm (arXiv)

    44. 2604.03183v1 Observation of anomalous thermal Hall effect in altermagnets (arXiv)

    45. 2604.03210v1 Vibrationally-mediated Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction as the origin of Chirality-Induced Spin Selectivity in donor-acceptor molecules (arXiv)

    46. 2603.01573v1 Weiner’s theory for exactly solvable Schr"odinger equation with symmetric double well potential (arXiv)

    47. 2604.02313v1 Topological Effects in Neural Network Field Theory (arXiv)

    48. 2604.02417v1 Provable quantum thermalization without statistical averages (arXiv)

    49. 2604.02424v1 Understanding the Symmetric Mass Generation in Lattice-QCD (arXiv)

    50. 2604.02731v1 Polaron Transformed Canonically Consistent Quantum Master Equation (arXiv)

    51. 2604.03011v1 Regio-Connectivity and Torsional Angle Effects on Singlet Fission and SOCT-ISC in Aza-BODIPY Dimers (arXiv)

    52. 2604.03148v1 Localization of coherent light into photons in a single-crystalline material (arXiv)

    53. 2604.03187v1 Biologically Realistic Dynamics for Nonlinear Classification in CMOS+X Neurons (arXiv)

    54. 2604.03228v1 Belief Propagation and Tensor Network Expansions for Many-Body Quantum Systems: Rigorous Results and Fundamental Limits (arXiv)
